prompt_used: Story: Ward 1908 (ward-1908) | Hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. | Subgenre: haunted institution | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing | Villain: The Record Keeper | Villain worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention. | Motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. Compose ending score cue for "Clean Resolution" that supports summary "You restore patient truth and secure legal action against surviving conspirators." and epilogue "Truth lands publicly with evidence that survives scrutiny.".
